response.description: Agent-facing assistance interface for Freeq client validation and diagnostic queries. Returns conclusions, never raw state.

diagnosis.summary: Client configuration looks compatible with current server expectations.

safe_facts: Capability bitmap observed: message-tags=true, server-time=true, batch=true, sasl=false, resume=false, e2ee=false, echo-message=true, away-notify=true.

diagnosis.summary: Only the account owner (or a server operator) may diagnose their join failures.

suggested_fixes.summary: Authenticate with a session at the Account disclosure level or higher.

redactions: Request denied before any server state was inspected.
